changes: FQA-001: Removed unused ArrowLeft and ArrowRight SVG imports
FQA-003: Added id='testimonials-selector' prop to BaseControl
FQA-005: Added 'relative' class to FilteredServerSideRender className to sync with PHP
FQA-004: Wrapped video modal in static flag ($testimonial_modal_rendered) so it renders only once across all block instances
FQA-006: Added aria-hidden='true' to video modal div by default
FQA-006: Added aria-hidden toggle in openModal() (set to 'false') and closeModal() (set to 'true')
FQA-007: Replaced innerHTML with DOM API (createElement) for building video/iframe elements to eliminate XSS risk from user-sourced URLs
FQA-007: Changed videoContainer.innerHTML='' to videoContainer.textContent='' for clearing
DQA-001: Changed student name h3 from text-header-5 to custom font-heading text-[1.5rem] md:text-[2.5rem] leading-[1.1] to match Figma's 40px desktop size
DQA-002: Changed program name p from font-heading text-header-6 leading-[1.15] to text-header-5 leading-[1.15] to match Figma's 24px desktop size

warnings: Asset size warnings (editor.js 325 KiB, screen 356 KiB) - pre-existing, not related to fixes

syncStatus.notes: TSX FilteredServerSideRender className now matches PHP swiper-parent classes (both include 'relative')

fixesApplied.description: Removed unused ArrowLeft and ArrowRight SVG imports from TSX
Prettier formatting - will be resolved by lint:fix in CI or next format pass
Added id prop to BaseControl for proper label association
Video modal now renders once globally using PHP static flag instead of per block instance. Eliminates 5 duplicate modal DOM nodes on test page.
Added 'relative' class to TSX FilteredServerSideRender wrapper to match PHP swiper-parent div, ensuring fade masks position correctly in editor
Added aria-hidden='true' to video modal by default in PHP. JS toggles aria-hidden to 'false' on open and 'true' on close.
Replaced innerHTML string interpolation with DOM API (createElement) for video and iframe elements. Eliminates stored XSS risk from post meta URLs.
Experimental API warnings for ToggleGroupControl - no action needed, consistent with project convention
Student name font size changed from text-header-5 (24px) to custom text-[1.5rem] md:text-[2.5rem] (24px mobile, 40px desktop) matching Figma spec
Program name font size changed from text-header-6 (20px) to text-header-5 (24px at desktop) matching Figma spec
